title: MineOps Catalog Localization
description: Key-value localization lookup table. One artifact in the versioned JSON package.

catalogVersion.description: Deterministic bundle version string matching the manifest.

releaseId.description: Source release identity from the capture envelope.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artifact was generated.

entries.description: Key-value localization entries. Keys are localization keys; values are localized strings.
